   1 | 05/06/2026 | 17:13:00 | Temperature #0x30 | Lower Non-critical going low  | Asserted
   2 | 05/06/2026 | 17:14:00 | Fan #0x71         | Lower Critical going low      | Asserted
   3 | 05/06/2026 | 17:20:00 | Memory #0x10      | Correctable ECC               | Asserted
   4 | 05/06/2026 | 17:21:00 | Memory #0x10      | Uncorrectable ECC             | Asserted
   5 | 05/06/2026 | 17:30:00 | Power Supply #0x02| AC Lost                       | Asserted
   6 | 05/06/2026 | 17:35:00 | Power Supply #0x02| Fully Redundant               | Deasserted
   7 | 05/06/2026 | 18:00:00 | System Event      | OEM System Boot Event         | Asserted
